_note: Subagent `description` is what Claude Code's main agent matches to decide WHEN to delegate (Task tool) — it must be trigger-phrased, not an identity label. `model` maps to the .claude/agents/<name>.md frontmatter (sonnet|opus|haiku|inherit); these are sensible defaults you can override at install time. The lead `stig` runs as the main agent (installed into CLAUDE.md), so it has no model of its own — it uses the session's model.

agents.name: stig
agents.description: The lead. Runs as the main agent (installed into CLAUDE.md), holds project context via Monet, and delegates to the workers below via the Task tool.

agents.name: explorer
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY to investigate the codebase: locate files, symbols, call sites, and how a feature works, then report concise findings. Read-only — never edits.

agents.name: researcher
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY when a decision needs external prior art, library docs, or web research the repo can't answer. Returns options and tradeoffs, not edits.

agents.name: analyst
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY for architecture and planning under constraints: assess feasibility, risks, and the approach before implementation. Does not write code.

agents.name: developer
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY to implement and refactor code, add tests, and run local validation, once the approach and the user's go-ahead are clear.

agents.name: tester
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY to verify a change: design and run tests, reproduce regressions, and judge whether it actually works.

agents.name: reviewer
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY after writing or changing code to review for correctness, security, and maintainability. Returns findings by severity; does not mutate PRs.

agents.name: security
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY for trust-boundary, auth, secrets, or data-exposure concerns: threat-model and review for security risk.

agents.name: reliability
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY for incident, regression, or release-readiness review: SLOs, observability, and operational risk.

agents.name: aria
agents.description: Use PROACTIVELY when product scope or acceptance criteria are unclear: define what and why, scope the work, and set acceptance criteria.
